name: Khan Academy
description: Free educational platform covering math, science, computing, and more. Video lessons, practice exercises, and personalized learning.

name: Coursera
description: Online learning platform offering courses, certificates, and degrees from top universities and companies worldwide.

name: Udemy
description: Marketplace for online courses on virtually any topic. Instructor-created content with lifetime access after purchase.

name: freeCodeCamp
description: Free, nonprofit coding bootcamp. Interactive curriculum covering web development, data science, and machine learning with certifications.

name: Codecademy
description: Interactive coding education platform. Hands-on exercises in Python, JavaScript, SQL, and 14+ languages with guided paths.

name: edX
description: Online learning platform founded by Harvard and MIT. University-level courses, professional certificates, and MicroMasters programs.

name: Brilliant
description: Interactive learning platform for math, science, and computer science. Bite-sized visual lessons that build problem-solving skills.

name: The Odin Project
description: Free, open-source web development curriculum. Full-stack path covering HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Ruby on Rails, and Node.js.

name: Pluralsight
description: Technology skills platform with expert-led video courses. Skill assessments, learning paths, and hands-on labs for IT and dev teams.

name: LeetCode
description: Coding challenge platform for technical interview prep. 3000+ problems, contests, and discussion forums for algorithm practice.

name: Exercism
description: Free coding practice in 70+ languages with mentor feedback. Concept exercises and practice tracks for every skill level.

name: Skillshare
description: Online learning community for creative skills. Short video classes in design, illustration, photography, and business.

name: Anki
description: Spaced repetition flashcard app for efficient memorization. Highly customizable with add-ons, media support, and shared decks.

name: Quizlet
description: Flashcard and study tool with multiple learning modes. AI-powered study paths, practice tests, and millions of shared sets.

name: Brainscape
description: Adaptive flashcard platform using confidence-based repetition. Pre-made and user-created decks across academic and professional topics.

name: RemNote
description: Note-taking tool with built-in spaced repetition. Turns notes into flashcards automatically. Knowledge base and study tool in one.

name: Mochi
description: Markdown-based spaced repetition flashcard app. Clean interface, templates, and cloze deletions for effective studying.

name: SuperMemo
description: The original spaced repetition software. Advanced algorithm (SM-18) for optimal review scheduling and incremental reading.

name: Orbit
description: Spaced repetition system by Andy Matuschak. Embeds review prompts into articles and books for long-term retention.

name: AnkiDroid
description: Free, open-source Android companion for Anki. Full spaced repetition with offline access, widgets, and shared deck downloads.

name: Knowt
description: AI-powered study tool that generates flashcards from notes and documents. Spaced repetition, practice tests, and free access.

name: Memrise
description: Language learning app using spaced repetition and video clips of native speakers. Gamified courses for 20+ languages.

name: Obsidian Spaced Repetition
description: Plugin for Obsidian that adds flashcard review with spaced repetition. Create cards inline in your notes using Markdown.

name: Vaia
description: AI-powered study platform (formerly StudySmarter) with flashcards, notes, and study plans. Shared content from textbooks and user-generated sets.

name: NeuraCache
description: Spaced repetition app that syncs with note-taking tools like Notion, Obsidian, and Markdown files. Daily review queue for long-term retention.

name: Kitsun
description: SRS flashcard platform with rich card templates, audio, and community decks. Focused on language learning with dictionary integration.

name: Flashcard Machine
description: Free web-based flashcard creator. Make, share, and study flashcard sets with text and images. No account required to browse.

name: Traverse
description: Study app combining mind mapping, note-taking, and spaced repetition flashcards in one tool. Visual approach to learning complex topics.

name: Revisely
description: AI-powered study tool that generates flashcards, quizzes, and summaries from your notes and documents automatically.

name: AnkiMobile Flashcards
description: Official Anki app for iOS by the Anki developer. Full spaced repetition with offline study, media support, and AnkiWeb sync.

name: StudyStack
description: Free flashcard platform with study games. Turns cards into matching, crossword, hangman, and quiz formats. Community-shared sets since 2001.

name: GoConqr
description: Study platform with flashcards, mind maps, quizzes, notes, and flowcharts. 25 million resources shared by 10 million members.

name: FSRS4Anki
description: Machine-learning spaced repetition scheduler for Anki. Learns your memory patterns to optimize review timing. Replaces the built-in scheduler.

name: 2anki
description: Convert Notion pages into Anki flashcard decks. Export structured notes as spaced repetition cards with formatting preserved.

name: Magoosh Flashcards
description: Free flashcard apps for GRE, GMAT, SAT, TOEFL, and IELTS vocabulary. Spaced repetition with progress tracking across 550M+ questions.

name: Polar
description: Document manager and annotation tool with integrated spaced repetition. Read, annotate, and create flashcards from PDFs and web content.
